slides.title: Your mouth is *connected* to your heart and brain.
slides.sub: Gum health is quietly linked to whole-body longevity. The fix is the boring basics, done daily.

slides.title: Gums and longevity
slides.body: Gum health is *linked to heart and brain* longevity. The mouth is more connected to the body than it looks.

slides.title: It does not stay put
slides.body: The same inflammation and bacteria from inflamed gums *may travel beyond the mouth*, reaching the heart and brain.

slides.title: Floss and show up
slides.body: Floss daily and see a dentist on schedule. These are *the boring basics that work*, and most people skip them.

slides.title: An overlooked lever
slides.body: Few longevity habits are *this easy and this ignored*. A few minutes a day is the whole ask.

slides.title: Quietly whole-body
slides.body: Healthy gums *quietly support a healthier body*. The benefit reaches far past a brighter smile.

slides.title: Track the small habits that *add up*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns the daily basics, sleep, food, water and movement, into one clear Health Score so nothing falls through the cracks.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your mouth is more connected to your heart and brain than you think. Gum health is quietly linked to whole-body longevity. 🦷

The same inflammation and bacteria may travel beyond the mouth, so floss daily and see a dentist. Boring basics, real payoff. Save this. 🔖
